'''''The Star Wars Trilogy Scrapbook: The Rebel Alliance''''' is a guide to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and its battles against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was written by [[Mark Cotta Vaz]] as part of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Trilogy Scrapbook]] series.

{{Book-stub}}

==Contents==
Introduction: The Light of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]
#The Rebel Organization
#*Rebel Leaders
#*Secret Bases
#*Data Entry - The Light of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]
#Weapons of War
#*[[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighters]]
#*[[Blaster/Legends|Blasters]]
#*[[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsabers]]
#*Data Entry - Philosophy of Life
#The Fighting Force
#*Starfighter [[Squadron/Legends|Squadron]] Leader and [[Pilot/Legends|Pilots]]
#*Freedom Fighters
#*Data Entry - A Galaxy to Save
#Rebel Triumphs
#*[[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]
#*[[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]
#*Data Entry - The Battles of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
Epilogue: Celebration
